hint: Warm-idle MAF outside 3–5 g/s: check intake/breather leaks first (the classic M271 fault)
Short-term trim beyond ±10%: active mixture correction — watch LTFT
LTFT high at warm idle: classic M271 partial-load breather-hose leak — see guide §2 tree
Warm idle should settle 87–95 °C (thermostat opens at 87 °C)
Engine-running voltage outside 13.8–14.5 V: charging-system check
Resting below 12.5 V suggests a weak or draining battery
